journal_date.text: ประจำวันที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
,sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date,'SD MONTH YYYY') as journal_tdate FROM sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_fin_m_close_day WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin = '01' /*WHERE*/

r_tge_sheet_cash_nest_dr.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,sum( sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount ) as dr_amount FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book = '0' and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '-' GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ORDER BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id

r_tge_sheet_cash_nest_cr.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,sum( sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount ) as cr_amount FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book = '0' and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+' GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ORDER BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id

r_tge_sheet_cash_nest_footer.sql:
SELECT sum( CASE WHEN sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+' THEN sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount ELSE 0 END ) as cr_amount ,sum( CASE WHEN sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_sign = '+' THEN 0 ELSE sc_fin_journal_detail.item_amount END ) as dr_amount , ( SELECT sum( sc_fin_journal_head.balance_begin ) FROM sc_fin_journal_head WHERE sc_fin_journal_head.journal_date = {0} ) as c_begin FROM sc_fin_journal_detail, sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.post_to_acc = '1' and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_fin_journal_detail.account_id and sc_fin_journal_detail.slip_group = sc_fin_ucf_vourcher_group.vourcher_group and sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_journal_detail.fin_book = '0'
GROUP BY sc_fin_journal_detail.journal_date
